params.name: Underworld Pomegranate
params.description:
On Apr 3, 4700 BC, Persephone ate several pomegranate seeds in the underworld, thus losing the opportunity to escape completely.
With Zeus' consent, Hades, who had long coveted the beauty of Persephone, abducted her into the underworld to be his wife. Her grieving mother, Demeter, searched for her everywhere, causing all life on earth to stop growing. Zeus was forced to compromise and sent an envoy to request that Hades return her. But due to Hades' trickery, Persephone ate several pomegranat …
